data._note: Realm generation rulesets. Stages are NOT preset — they are generated deterministically at runtime by StageGenerator using CampaignSeed + these rules. The generator caches results in save so a player always sees the same stages on the same campaign. To change stage content: adjust the pools and ranges here. To change a specific stage a player has already generated: that requires a save migration.

realm.01.name: Vale of Dust
realm.01.description: A forgotten stretch of bleached earth where corrupted waymarkers still call out to passing spirits. The first proving ground for any Keeper.

generation._note_seed: StageGenerator derives per-stage seeds as: seed_namespace + '.stage.' + stage_index (e.g. 'campaign.realm.01.stage.0'). Each objective within a stage is further derived from that stage seed.

stage_rules._note_topology: linear = each objective connects only to the next. branching is reserved for post-MVP. Generator reads this to build the connections array.
stage_rules._note_constraints: entry_type and exit_type are forced — the generator always places these at the start and end. Middle nodes are drawn from objective_pool. If min_objectives is 2, there are no middle nodes (entry + exit only).

group_pools._note: Maps objective_type to a weighted list of group_ids from actors.json. Generator picks one group per objective using the objective's derived seed.

structure_pools._note: Maps objective_type to a list of structure_template_ids. Generator picks one randomly per objective. null for types that have no structure.

spirit_pools._note: Maps objective_type to a list of spirit_template_ids. null for types that have no spirit.

reward_ranges._note: Generator rolls a value in [min, max] (inclusive, integer) for each objective using a derived seed. boss uses its own range regardless of objective_type. stage_completion is rolled once per stage.

realm.02.name: The Ashen Hollow
realm.02.description: A sunken basin choked with calcified grief. The air resists movement. Echoes that enter here are tested far beyond the vale.

generation._note_pool: realm.02 introduces survival mode as a weighted combat variant. Two entries with objective_type 'combat' but different resolution_mode — the generator treats them as distinct draws.
